2606.29960.title: IHDec: Divergence-Steered Contrastive Decoding for Securing Multi-Turn Instruction Hierarchies
2606.29960.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often fail to maintain instruction hierarchies (IH) when processing multi-source inputs with varying role-level priorities, paradoxically adhering to lower-priority directives during conflicts. While existing defenses mitigate this issue, they are largely restricted to single-turn scenarios and require expensive fine-tuning. In this paper, we formalize this failure mode in multi-turn contexts via a Jensen-Shannon Divergence (JSD) framework, uncovering a pervasive role-influence inversion phenomenon where subordinate inputs override superior roles. To rectify this without training, we propose IHDec (Instruction Hierarchy-steered Decoding). IHDec leverages JSD to automatically detect token-level hierarchy violations and dynamically executes contrastive decoding to suppress misaligned subordinate roles. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that IHDec outperforms training-based baselines in multi-turn conflicts while fully preserving general response quality. Furthermore, IHDec strengthens safety against adversarial prompt injections and exhibits a robust scaling synergy with larger models. The Code is available at https://github.com/nxcolelxu/IHDec.git
2606.29960.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在處理具有不同角色層級優先權的多來源輸入時，常常無法維持指令層級（IH），在衝突中矛盾地遵循較低優先權的指令。雖然現有的防禦措施減輕了這個問題，但它們大多僅限於單回合場景，並且需要昂貴的微調。在本文中，我們通過詹森-香農散度（JSD）框架正式化了這種在多回合上下文中的失敗模式，揭示了一種普遍的角色影響反轉現象，其中下屬輸入覆蓋了上級角色。為了解決這個問題而不進行訓練，我們提出了IHDec（指令層級引導解碼）。IHDec利用JSD自動檢測令牌層級違規，並動態執行對比解碼以抑制不對齊的下屬角色。大量評估顯示，IHDec在多回合衝突中超越了基於訓練的基準，同時完全保留了整體回應質量。此外，IHDec增強了對抗性提示注入的安全性，並與更大模型展現出強大的擴展協同。代碼可在 https://github.com/nxcolelxu/IHDec.git 獲得。
2606.29960.author: Nicole Geumheon Liu et.al.
2606.29960.authors: Nicole Geumheon Liu, Haeun Jang, Yonghyun Jun, Hwanhee Lee
